👤 Owner: withkynam

📝 Repository: withkynam/vibecode-pro-max-kit

📄 Descrizione: Your AI forgets. This remembers. Spec-driven coding harness for vibecoders, product owners, CEOs and real builders — self-improving context memory, 12 agents, 32 skills. Kills context rot, ships features, not spaghetti. Claude Code & Codex. Any stack. 30 seconds

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript
